items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "What Parameter Golf Taught Us".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research published=Tue, 12 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/what-parameter-golf-taught-us description=Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints. title=How enterprises are scaling AI published=Mon, 11 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/business/guides-and-resources/how-enterprises-are-scaling-ai description=How enterprises scale AI: from early experiments to compounding impact through trust, governance, workflow design, and quality at scale. title=GPT-5.5 Instant System Card published=Tue, 05 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/gpt-...
diff_excerpt: +title=What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research

+description=Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.
title=How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
description=ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
+description=How enterprises scale AI: from early experiments to compounding impact through trust, governance, workflow design, and quality at scale.
title=OpenAI Campus Network: Student club interest form
description=OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
-description=OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.
